title: Bifurkzen
description: A modpack designed to optimize your survival experience and increase performance.
body:
**Objective:**
This modpack seeks to provide the best experience in minecraft, having a balance between useful features and performance without affecting the "Vanilla" style of the game.

**Convenience-Friendly Features**: A minimap that will make you never get lost, and the function to keep your inventory and chests organized 
-  **One-click FullBright**. Illuminate caves and dark corners with the press of a key. 
-  **Built-in optifine features**: Customizable shaders, connected textures, and smooth zooming.
